findings.title: Test asserts wrong table name in registerStoreRefresh
findings.why_it_matters: The test expects 'study_sessions' but the correct Dexie key is 'studySessions'. Both the implementation and the test are wrong together, making the test a false green that actively masks the P0 correctness bug.
evidence: This test passes currently because both the hook and the test use 'study_sessions', but the correct key is 'studySessions'

findings.title: No test for refreshPendingCount in useSyncStatusStore
findings.why_it_matters: refreshPendingCount has a Dexie query and silent catch path. Plan specifies 4 store test scenarios including this, but no store unit test file exists.
evidence: Plan Unit 1 specifies 4 test scenarios for useSyncStatusStore but no test file was created for the store itself
The store test scenarios were grouped into Unit 4 (hook tests only) — the store itself has no test coverage

testing_gaps: useSyncStatusStore has no unit tests — markSyncComplete, setStatus, refreshPendingCount are untested
beforeunload sendBeacon path is not tested (expected given async nature, but worth noting)
